scope: Purpose-limited historical reference for Stride 2B.3 Web NFC serial-number acquisition and bounded session lifecycle adaptation only.

files.notes: Exact historical scanner bytes. Authorized only as reference for adapting NDEFReader capability detection, user-initiated scan, reading-event serialNumber capture, and user-visible NFC state. Do not copy the component wholesale or restore Tailwind, lucide-react, alert(), global error handlers, camera code, navigation, persistence, or Firebase.

validation.officialRepositoryLocalNodeValidator: NOT_RUN in packet-creation environment; AI Studio must run node scripts/validate-source-packet.cjs after download and extraction.

limitations: This packet authorizes reference and adaptation of Web NFC serialNumber acquisition only.
The active implementation must not copy Scanner.tsx wholesale or modify the accepted QR camera lifecycle.
NDEF message or record parsing, tag writing, makeReadOnly, navigation, item lookup, Firebase, Firestore, authentication, persistence, migration, and synchronization remain excluded.
The historical alert(), @ts-ignore, Tailwind, lucide-react, and global error-handler patterns are not authorized.
The active implementation must use explicit user initiation and bounded cancellation/cleanup rather than leaving a reader session active.
